Install:
Copy Envys_Text_Animator.lua into:

%APPDATA%\Blackmagic Design\DaVinci Resolve\Support\Fusion\Scripts\Utility

Restart DaVinci Resolve, then run:
Workspace > Scripts > Utility > Envys_Text_Animator

Optional:
Copy assets\Envystalogo.png into an assets folder beside Envys_Text_Animator.lua
if you want the logo to appear in the UI.
